goal: Deliver PRD v2 Phase 2 by adding a usable statistics page, completing vocabulary management overhaul, and hardening the app for production-ready UX and reliability.
scope: Statistics page UI and data aggregation pipeline
Vocabulary management module (status editing, filtering, due review visibility, bulk actions where PRD defines)
State persistence/sync paths used by stats and vocabulary management (local + cloud paths)
Production polish areas: loading/empty/error states, interaction feedback, copy consistency, and guardrails
Regression-safe updates in main app flow and any supporting API/client utilities
constraints: Stay within PRD v2 Phase 2 boundaries; do not implement Phase 3/payment/major backend redesign unless explicitly required.
Prefer extending existing files/components and state models; avoid unnecessary file proliferation or architecture churn.
Maintain backward compatibility of existing localStorage/supabase progress data to prevent user data loss.
Do not break current learning loop (guess/teach/spectrum/review/cloze) while introducing stats and management changes.
Keep UI performance acceptable on mobile (avoid heavy synchronous recomputation during render).
Use deterministic date/time handling for daily/weekly statistics and due-review logic.
acceptance_tests: Statistics page renders key metrics defined in PRD (e.g., learned counts, accuracy, streak, review outcomes) and values match underlying stored session/progress data.
Statistics filters/time windows (if defined) update metrics correctly and do not produce inconsistent totals.
Vocabulary management supports status edits and filters with immediate UI reflection and persistence after refresh/reopen.
Due-review and priority indicators in vocabulary management are accurate for sample words across unlearned/learning/mastered/uncertain/error cases.
Production polish checks: loading, empty, and error states are shown appropriately for stats and vocab sections; no dead-end actions.
Regression pass confirms existing Phase 1/learning flows remain functional and build succeeds in production mode.
implementation_steps: Map PRD Phase 2 requirements to current code paths, identifying exact gaps in stats calculations, vocab management UX, and production polish behaviors.
Implement/normalize derived data selectors for statistics and vocabulary status summaries, ensuring consistent date-boundary and due-review logic.
Build the statistics page/section UI using existing styling system and wire it to persisted data sources with clear empty/loading states.
Overhaul vocabulary management interactions (filtering, status updates, due/priority cues, and any PRD-defined management actions) while preserving existing state semantics.
Apply production-ready polish: validation messages, button disabled states, edge-case handling, and consistent copy/visual feedback across primary user journeys.
Add/extend verification coverage and run full regression/build validation, then finalize with concise release-ready behavior checks.
summary: Phase 2 will be executed by adding a trustworthy stats surface, strengthening vocabulary management into an operational control panel, and polishing reliability/UX so the current app is production-ready without expanding scope beyond PRD v2 Phase 2.
